---
name: Template Request
about: Suggest a new OG image template
title: "[Template] "
labels: template-request
assignees: ''
---

**Category**
Which category does this template belong to? (blog, product, saas, github, event, podcast, developer, newsletter, quote, ecommerce, job, tutorial)

**Template Name**
A short name for the template.

**Description**
What does the template look like? Describe the visual style, layout, and key elements.

**Use Case**
When would someone use this template? What problem does it solve?

**Reference/Inspiration**
Links to similar designs or screenshots for reference.
